item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-n11","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":false,"first_sentence_lock":null,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":false,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The assistant treated the prompt as a user-owned tradeoff, directly listing visible and hidden costs across cost, speed, and experience options. It did not invoke triage, force a brake verdict, or decide for the user; it preserved the requested structure and explicitly framed the tradeoffs without拍板."}
